meta.name: S-Coin Comment Templates - Natural Casual Malaysia 200x2
meta.description: 400 unique customer-editable S-Coin review helper templates: 200 earn comments and 200 redeem comments. Written in natural casual Malaysian social media style with mixed BM/English and light short form.
meta.recommended_use: Use as a starting point. Customers may edit the review to match their real experience before posting.

earn: {item}
{price}
{percent}
{netValue}
redeem: {item}
{points}
{value}

notes: Each opening phrase is intentionally varied to avoid repeated intros.
Earn comments mention item, price, S-Coin cashback percent, and net S-Coin value.
Redeem comments mention item, S-Coin used, and redemption value.
Avoid adding RM before placeholders in the app if values are already formatted with RM.
